revisionSummary: Canonical plan version updated; the run-only schedule and completed-session preservation rules are unchanged.
title: Winter Challenge Run Plan

sessions.title: 8 × 30 sec run / 90 sec walk
sessions.summary: First controlled running exposure. Stay relaxed and finish wanting more.
coachingNotes: Repeat or shorten the session if joint signal rises above 4/10 or recovery is clearly worsening.
blocks: First controlled running exposure. Stay relaxed and finish wanting more.
Repeat or shorten the session if joint signal rises above 4/10 or recovery is clearly worsening.

Repeat or shorten the session if joint signal rises above 4/10 or recovery is clearly worsening.
